code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut j = n - 1
mut ok = true
while i < j
  let a = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
  if a != b
    ok = false
  end
  i = i + 1
  j = j - 1
end

if ok
  print("YES")
else
  print("NO")
end
